data.content: Implemented the conversation-log pulldown update on branch foolery-284e-history-date. Each dropdown entry now shows a single conversation identifier (#<conversation> <sessionId>) and includes the conversation date alongside the existing time, while the selected trigger behavior stays unchanged. Added focused unit coverage for the date/time and conversation label helpers. Validation in worktree .worktrees/foolery-284e: bun run lint (passes with one existing React Compiler warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed. Commit: 2663ac9b8742.
